title: ratibida columnifera
intro: Ratibida columnifera, also known as the pinnate prairie coneflower, is a perennial plant native to the Great Plains region of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ratibida columnifera include reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and providing relief from digestive issues. Ratibida columnifera can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
